mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.item_no ORDER BY b.bid_price DESC) rn FROM BID b WHERE b.user_no = #{userNo} ) t WHERE rn = 1
SELECT * FROM ITEM WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY item_no DESC
SELECT i.* FROM WISHLIST w JOIN ITEM i ON w.item_no = i.item_no WHERE w.user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT * FROM BOARD_POST WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY board_no DESC
SELECT r.reply_no, r.reply_content, r.reply_date, b.board_no, b.board_title FROM REPLY r JOIN BOARD_POST b ON r.board_no = b.board_no WHERE r.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY r.reply_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET user_name = #{userName}, user_address = #{userAddress}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, user_email = #{userEmail} WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT user_no, user_id, user_name, user_address, user_phone, user_email, user_enroll_date FROM MEMBER WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
